description: Curated, deterministic assertion packs for common voice-agent compliance checks. Each pack is a set of assert.v1 assertions built from the deterministic, offline, model-free kinds; merge one or more into a run with `hotato assert run --pack NAME`. Every check measures a deterministic signal in the transcript or trace (a phrase present or absent, a detector hit, a phrase ordering), never intent, and makes no certification claim.

packs.name: required-disclosure
packs.title: Required disclosures
packs.description: Checks that the agent speaks required compliance disclosures (a recording notice and a consent request).

packs.name: prohibited-language
packs.title: Prohibited language
packs.description: Checks that the agent avoids prohibited phrasing (guarantee/promise language and unsolicited medical direction).

packs.name: pii-leak
packs.title: PII leak
packs.description: Checks that no SSN, card number, email, or phone number leaks into the transcript.

packs.name: identity-verification-order
packs.title: Identity verification order
packs.description: Checks that the agent requests identity verification and that it occurs before any account details are disclosed.
